rejection_reason: structure: email_single_cta — follow-up email contains four CTAs (book a call, watch a video, download a guide, reply). Only one CTA is permitted per email. Choose the most appropriate ask for this sequence step.
text:
Subject: Re: {{company}}'s productivity

Hey {{first_name}},

Following up on my last note about FlowAI.

Here are a few ways to learn more and take the next step:

1. Book a 15-minute call: [calendar link]
2. Watch a 3-minute product video: [video link]
3. Download our ROI calculator: [guide link]
4. Or just reply here and let me know what's most useful

Whatever works best for you — I'm flexible!

[Signature]

FlowAI · 123 Main St, San Francisco CA 94105 · Unsubscribe
